regime_fall.current_status: Day 42 escalation has intensified with Trump issuing an 8 PM EDT April 8 deadline for Strait of Hormuz reopening while Israel accelerates strikes on Tehran airports and targeting senior IRGC officials; Iran's regime exhibits severe internal fracture with Pezeshkian accusing IRGC of sabotaging ceasefire, hardliners purging reformists, and contradictory signals including limited ship releases and formal ceasefire rejection despite reviewing a 15-point US peace plan.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Trump set 8 PM Eastern Time deadline on April 8, 2026, threatening massive strikes if Strait of Hormuz not reopened, while Israel simultaneously accelerated strikes on Tehran airports and targeted IRGC intelligence chief Seyed Majid Khademi.
